steps.title: Identify the constraint direction from 'at most'
steps.content: The phrase at most 150 inches means the perimeter cannot exceed 150. This translates to a $\leq$ inequality, not $\geq$. This eliminates choices B and D immediately.

steps.title: Set up the perimeter formula with given dimensions
steps.content:
For a rectangle:
  • Length $L = 55$ inches
  • Width $W = x$ inches
The perimeter is $P = 2L + 2W = 2(55) + 2x = 2x + 110$.

steps.title: Apply the constraint and match the answer choice
steps.content:
Since the perimeter is at most 150 inches:
$$2x + 110 \leq 150$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
